candidates.title: Post-Release Hygiene Consolidation
candidates.safety_boundary: Post-release docs, checker, and tests only; no runtime trading, broker, provider, risk, approval, or kill-switch changes.
candidates.release_tag_pypi_status: no v0.6.13 tag, GitHub Release, source version bump, or PyPI publish
candidates.reviewer_value: Makes the v0.6.12 public evidence canonical and keeps the v0.6.13 planning line explicit.

candidates.title: Bounded Autonomy Governance
candidates.safety_boundary: Governance docs and deterministic checks only; live autonomy remains externally gated and unavailable by default.
candidates.release_tag_pypi_status: no v0.6.13 tag, GitHub Release, source version bump, or PyPI publish
candidates.reviewer_value: Documents the staged autonomy ladder and hard safety invariants for reviewers.

candidates.title: Autonomous Paper Workflow Demo and Evidence Gate
candidates.safety_boundary: Paper-only demo and evidence gate; no live mode, provider keys, broker calls, or network requirement.
candidates.release_tag_pypi_status: no v0.6.13 tag, GitHub Release, source version bump, or PyPI publish
candidates.reviewer_value: Gives reviewers a deterministic local L1 paper workflow they can run without credentials.

candidates.title: Paper Mode Offline Provider Isolation and No-Network Gate
candidates.safety_boundary: Paper-mode provider isolation only; live mode stays fail-closed and no broker execution is added.
candidates.release_tag_pypi_status: no v0.6.13 tag, GitHub Release, source version bump, or PyPI publish
candidates.reviewer_value: Proves paper workflows can remain offline and provider-free while preserving live safeguards.

candidates.title: Autonomous Paper Strategy Evaluation Matrix and Promotion Gate
candidates.safety_boundary: Deterministic paper backtest comparison only; no provider, broker, live, safety, risk, or release side effects.
candidates.release_tag_pypi_status: no v0.6.13 tag, GitHub Release, source version bump, or PyPI publish
candidates.reviewer_value: Shows sample-data strategy evaluation with paper-only follow-up decisions.

candidates.title: Paper Strategy Sensitivity Matrix and Deterministic Fixture
candidates.safety_boundary: Deterministic paper parameter sensitivity only; no live promotion, provider calls, broker calls, or release side effects.
candidates.release_tag_pypi_status: no v0.6.13 tag, GitHub Release, source version bump, or PyPI publish
candidates.reviewer_value: Helps reviewers see whether paper strategy behavior is parameter-sensitive on local fixtures.

candidates.title: Multi-Regime Paper Strategy Robustness Report
candidates.safety_boundary: Synthetic multi-regime paper reporting only; no provider, broker, live, safety, risk, or release side effects.
candidates.release_tag_pypi_status: no v0.6.13 tag, GitHub Release, source version bump, or PyPI publish
candidates.reviewer_value: Helps detect one-regime overfitting before any further paper-only follow-up.

candidates.title: Paper Walk-Forward Robustness Pack and Stability Checks
candidates.safety_boundary: Deterministic chronological walk-forward paper testing only; no live promotion, provider calls, broker calls, or release side effects.
candidates.release_tag_pypi_status: no v0.6.13 tag, GitHub Release, source version bump, or PyPI publish
candidates.reviewer_value: Adds rolling-window stability evidence for paper-only strategy review.

candidates.title: Paper Strategy Candidate Scorecard and Promotion Ledger
candidates.safety_boundary: Paper strategy scorecard and ledger only; no live approval, provider execution, broker execution, or release side effects.
candidates.release_tag_pypi_status: no v0.6.13 tag, GitHub Release, source version bump, or PyPI publish
candidates.reviewer_value: Aggregates paper evaluation, sensitivity, robustness, and walk-forward evidence into one candidate ledger.
